archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) tailored for Premium Institutional FinTech/PropTech
core_principles: Authority and Clarity: Clean lines, stark contrast, and data-first hierarchy.
Functional Beauty: 95% monochrome (Navy + White) to let the Champagne Gold accent and KPI status colors direct action.
Negative Space: Generous padding for a premium, non-cluttered 'Old Money Tech' feel.
Spanish UI First: Ensure typography accommodates longer Spanish words.

rules: No generic 'Inter' for headings. Cabinet Grotesk provides an authoritative, premium institutional voice.
Outfit for body text ensures high legibility for dense tables and metrics.
Overlines and table column headers MUST be Uppercase, text-xs, and wide spacing 'tracking-wider'.
Do not default to 'Bold' for everything. Use 'font-medium' for standard emphasis and 'font-light' for large display numbers.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: MODE B: THE 'CONTROL ROOM' GRID for the dashboard.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use p-6 or p-8 for cards and internal padding to prevent text collision and maintain a premium feel.
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Use sharp edges or very subtle roundness (max 8px border-radius `rounded-md`). Avoid 'glassmorphism' here; use solid backgrounds with crisp 1px borders (`border-border`) and very subtle layered shadows (`shadow-sm`) to separate from the pure white background.

components.cards: Go minimalist. Flat white background, 1px subtle border, no heavy drop shadows. On hover, apply a slight lift (`-translate-y-0.5`) and `shadow-md`.
components.buttons: Primary buttons: `bg-[#031433] text-white hover:bg-[#031433]/90`. Accent buttons: `bg-[#D3A154] text-[#031433] hover:bg-[#D3A154]/90`. Apply smooth transitions: `transition-all duration-200`.
components.tables: Use Shadcn Table. Do not wrap the table in a thick card; go cardless or use a minimal border. Ensure status badges (Pagado, Pendiente, Atrasado) are styled distinctly using the status colors provided.
components.navigation: Fixed sidebar on desktop (`w-64`), hidden on mobile (use hamburger menu). Sidebar should have a very light gray background (`bg-slate-50`) or use the primary `#031433` for a high-contrast institutional look (preferred).
components.charts: Use Recharts or Shadcn chart components. Use Navy `#031433` and Gold `#D3A154` for main data points.
components.forms: Use Shadcn components (Input, Select, Checkbox). Do not use native HTML inputs.
components.contract_viewer: Create a clear modal or page for digital contracts with a simulated signature area. The signature area should have a subtle dotted border, a pale gray background (`bg-slate-50`), and use a script font or cursive text to simulate the digital signature. Include a 'Firmar Contrato' button.

animations.micro_interactions: Subtle hover states on all interactive elements. Buttons must have hover lift and shadow increase. Table rows should have a very subtle `hover:bg-slate-50` transition.
animations.page_transitions: Keep it fast. Dashboards require speed. Minimal fade-in for charts.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure white text on the Champagne Gold accent meets minimum 3:1 contrast for large text; if not, use Navy text on Gold.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="login-btn"`, `data-testid="kpi-revenue"`).

media.icons: Use `lucide-react` (already installed) for clean, professional iconography.

image_urls.description: Modern contemporary glass architecture, ideal for property thumbnails in the Rent Roll table.
Stylish residential building, ideal for dashboard hero or property detail view.
Elegant professional portrait, use for Admin profile avatar.
Confident business person, use for Tenant/Inquilino profile avatar.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load `@fontsource/cabinet-grotesk` and `@fontsource/outfit` or equivalent Google Fonts in the application.
Ensure the UI is 100% in Spanish as requested (e.g. 'Ingresos', 'Ocupación', 'Contratos por Vencer', 'Morosidad').
Implement Google Login mockup (simulated auth flow) and conditionally render Admin vs Inquilino views.
The Rent Roll table MUST feature the dynamic status badges according to the colors defined here.
Build the dashboard using the 'Control Room' grid layout.
Add `data-testid` to all key elements for testing. Use kebab-case.
Design the Contract Viewer (Visualizador de Contratos) with a digital signature area simulation.
Apply hover states for all buttons.
